Title: Legal Letters
Label: Insurance Claim Appeal
Structure: Formal business letter with introduction, facts, argument, and requested resolution.
Intent: Persuade the recipient to reconsider a denied insurance claim.
InputScaffold:
[Who] submitted the claim
[What] was denied
[When] the denial occurred
[Why] the denial should be reconsidered

ToneDirectives.Professional: Use a professional and respectful legal tone.
ToneDirectives.Firm: Use a firm and assertive legal tone.
ToneDirectives.Neutral: Use a calm and objective legal tone.

RoleInstruction: You are an experienced legal assistant preparing a formal appeal letter.

Title: Legal Letters
Label: Payment Demand
Structure: Formal demand letter outlining debt, timeline, and requested action.
Intent: Demand payment for an outstanding obligation.
InputScaffold:
[Who] owes the money
[Amount owed]
[When] payment was due
[Any prior communication]

ToneDirectives.Professional: Use a professional and businesslike tone.
ToneDirectives.Firm: Use a direct and assertive legal tone.
ToneDirectives.Neutral: Use a factual and neutral tone.

RoleInstruction: You are an experienced legal assistant preparing a formal payment demand letter.
